headline: Supermicro Simplifies Edge AI Deployments with Validated Kubernetes Appliances with Red Hat and Everpure
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc.(NASDAQ: SMCI), an AI, Enterprise, Storage, and 5G/Edge Total IT Solution Provider featuring Data Center Building Block Solutions® (DCBBS), today announced the launch of Kubernetes Edge AI appliances in collaboration with Red Hat and Everpure.
